CBclient - Class in i5.cb.api

CBclient() - Constructor for class i5.cb.api.CBclient
for compatibility only
CBclient(String, int, String, String) - Constructor for class i5.cb.api.CBclient
opens a direct connection to a ConceptBase server, via a LocalCBclient object.

opens a connection to a ConceptBase server, either via a local or a remote CBclient object, depending on iUseCBclient.

opens a connection to a ConceptBase server, either via a local or a remote CBclient object, depending on iUseCBclient.

CBConnectionException - Exception in i5.cb.api
Thrown to indicate that the Connection to the ConceptBase Server could not be established for example because of DNS-Lookup Failure Applications can subclass this class to indicate similar exceptions

Constructs a CBConnectionException with no detail message.

CBMessageException - Exception in i5.cb.api
Thrown to indicate that the requested message could not be handled by the ConceptBase Server or the incoming message could not be handled by the CBclient.
CBMessageException() - Constructor for exception i5.cb.api.CBMessageException
Constructs a CBMessageException with no detail message.
CBMessageException(String) - Constructor for exception i5.cb.api.CBMessageException
Constructs a CBMessageException with the specified detail message.
CBNotificationConnection - Class in i5.cb.api
A connection to a ConceptBase server via which the server sends notification messages to the client.
CBNotificationConnection(CBConnectionData) - Constructor for class i5.cb.api.CBNotificationConnection
opens a notification connection to a ConceptBase server, either via a local or a remote CBclient object, depending on connData.
CBNotificationConnection(String, int, String, String) - Constructor for class i5.cb.api.CBNotificationConnection
opens a direct notification connection to a ConceptBase server.
CBNotificationConnection(String, int, String, String, int, String, int) - Constructor for class i5.cb.api.CBNotificationConnection
opens a notification connection to a ConceptBase server, either via a local or a remote CBclient object, depending on iUseCBclient.

NotificationParser - Class in i5.cb.api.notification
parses notification sent from a ConceptBase server First, construct a NotificationParser object:
NotificationParser parser = new NotificationParser( System.in ); Second, call the function that parses up to the nonterminal symbol you are expecting, generally Notification.

SELECTION_MODE_ADD - Static variable in class i5.cb.graph.DiagramDesktop
In this selection mode the actual selection is cleared and all chosen nodes are selected.
SELECTION_MODE_NEW - Static variable in class i5.cb.graph.DiagramDesktop
In this selection mode the chosen nodes are added to the actual selection.
SELECTION_MODE_SWITCH - Static variable in class i5.cb.graph.DiagramDesktop
In this selection mode the chosen nodes are removed from the actual selection, if they are already selected.
